readings.summary: We may choose life or death.

readings.citation:
Ps 119:1-2, 4-5, 17-18, 33-34, R. v.1b
Blessed are they who follow the law of the Lord!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 119:1-2, 4-5, 17-18, 33-34, R. v.1b
Blessed are they who follow the law of the Lord!

readings.summary: God reveals his wisdom through the Spirit.

Blessed are you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth;
you have revealed to little ones the mysteries of the kingdom.
Jesus comes to fulfill the law.

antiphons.text:
Be my protector, O God,
a mighty stronghold to save me.
For you are my rock, my stronghold!
Lead me, guide me, for the sake of your name.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Jn 3:16
antiphons.text:
God so loved the world
that he gave his Only Begotten Son,
so that all who believe in him may not perish,
but may have eternal life.
